proposal1.heroHeadline: Example is losing countless hours and potential deals every month on manual proposal generation.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Currently, creating proposals for their services takes hours. Now, it happens in 47 seconds.
proposal1.problemsIntro: Below are the ongoing losses Example faces without automation.

problems.title: Wasted Hours
problems.description: Example spends over 30 hours monthly on proposal writing. This is time not spent on closing deals or improving client relationships.

problems.title: Delayed Responses
problems.description: Every day a proposal is late, Example risks losing client interest. Delays erode trust and can result in lost contracts.

problems.title: Inconsistency
problems.description: Manual processes lead to inconsistent branding. Each mistake impacts Example's professional image and reduces client confidence.

problems.title: High Labor Costs
problems.description: Paying staff to draft proposals is costly. Funds are drained on repetitive tasks rather than strategic growth.

problems.title: Reduced Capacity
problems.description: Time on proposals limits the number of clients Example can engage. Fewer proposals mean fewer opportunities for revenue.

problems.title: Missed Opportunities
problems.description: Without quick turnarounds, potential clients may choose competitors. Each missed opportunity is lost revenue.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Our AI system replaces all these inefficiencies.

solutions.title: Instant Proposals
solutions.description: Currently, proposals take hours to draft. With our system, they are ready in under 60 seconds.

solutions.title: Consistent Branding
solutions.description: Manual efforts lead to branding errors. Our system ensures every proposal is perfectly branded.

solutions.title: Cost Savings
solutions.description: High labor costs for proposal writing drain resources. Our solution cuts these costs significantly.

solutions.title: Increased Engagement
solutions.description: Limited proposal capacity reduces engagement. Automated proposals allow Example to reach more clients.

solutions.title: Real-time Tracking
solutions.description: Currently, Example lacks insight into proposal reception. Our system provides real-time tracking for better follow-ups.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for Example's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for Example around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for Example.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Elevate Acme Corp's Digital Presence with Example's Expertise.
proposal2.heroSubheadline: Our comprehensive approach will enhance your online footprint and drive measurable results.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Acme Corp is currently experiencing losses due to various operational inefficiencies.

problems.title: Underperforming Website
problems.description: Every visitor who leaves your site without converting is revenue walking out the door. Current bounce rates indicate a significant loss of potential leads.

problems.title: Ineffective Social Media
problems.description: Your social media channels aren't generating engagement, resulting in lost brand visibility and customer acquisition opportunities.

problems.title: Poor SEO Ranking
problems.description: Low search engine rankings mean your competition is capturing potential clients, causing a direct loss in market share.

problems.title: Inconsistent Branding
problems.description: Brand inconsistency across platforms leads to customer confusion, which can result in lost loyalty and sales.

problems.title: Outdated Content Strategy
problems.description: Your current content fails to convert due to lack of engagement, leading to a loss in customer retention and authority.

problems.title: Limited Market Analysis
problems.description: Without comprehensive market insights, strategic decisions may lead to missed opportunities and revenue loss.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Our solutions are designed to address these losses and enhance Acme Corp's market position.

solutions.title: Website Development
solutions.description: Revamp your website to increase user engagement and conversion rates. This will capture potential revenue currently being lost.

solutions.title: SEO Optimization
solutions.description: Improve search rankings to ensure your brand captures market share from competitors. This directly addresses lost visibility.

solutions.title: Social Media Management
solutions.description: Enhance social media presence to boost engagement and brand recognition, recovering lost opportunities for customer acquisition.

solutions.title: Content Strategy
solutions.description: Develop a robust content strategy to increase engagement and authority, transforming your current content losses into gains.

proposal2.whyUsIntro: Example is positioned to drive Acme Corp's success with proven expertise.

whyUsCards.title: Proven Track Record
whyUsCards.description: Our history of successful projects speaks for itself. We consistently deliver results that exceed expectations.

whyUsCards.title: Client-Centric Approach
whyUsCards.description: We prioritize your goals and tailor our strategies to ensure you achieve them efficiently.

whyUsCards.title: Innovative Solutions
whyUsCards.description: We bring fresh, creative ideas to the table, ensuring your brand stands out in the market.

whyUsCards.title: Data-Driven Strategies
whyUsCards.description: Our decisions are based on in-depth analysis and real-time data to optimize your ROI.

proposal2.teamIntro: Our team is dedicated to your success.

team.name: there
team.bio: As the Executive Director, I lead strategic initiatives and foster strong client relationships to ensure successful outcomes.

proposal2.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Discovery & Planning
process.description: We begin by understanding your business needs and setting clear objectives.

process.title: Design & Development
process.description: Our team designs and develops tailored solutions to meet your goals.

process.title: Implementation
process.description: We implement strategies and monitor their performance closely.

process.title: Optimization & Review
process.description: We refine strategies based on data and feedback to enhance results.

proposal2.pricingIntro: Choose the investment option that aligns with your business goals.

pricing.name: Basic Plan
pricing.description: Ideal for small businesses looking to improve their online presence.

pricing.name: Growth Plan
pricing.description: Recommended for businesses aiming to expand their market reach.

pricing.name: Enterprise Plan
